title: Halmstad, Halland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Halmstad, Halland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Halmstad is a city in Halland with a population of 71,000. A popular west coast summer destination with sandy beaches, a historic castle, and a lively music festival.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
